summary: Enforce mandatory agent registration and handoff in plugin v1.1.5
context: Eval results showed agents skipping twining_register and twining_handoff, breaking multi-agent coordination traceability. The plugin hooks and behaviors needed strengthening.
rationale: Changed REGISTER rules from SHOULD to MUST, added GEN-01 through GEN-04 general principles prioritizing task completion, updated PreToolUse hook to require registration before assembly, enhanced stop-hook to block exit without handoff after code changes, and updated orient/handoff skills to reflect mandatory registration and handoff workflows.

alternatives.option: Keep registration and handoff as SHOULD-level recommendations
alternatives.reason_rejected: Agents consistently skipped optional coordination steps, defeating the purpose of multi-agent traceability
